---
title: "differential_abundance"
output: html_document
author: "Howard Chen"
---

# Differential Abundance Analysis using ANCOMBC2

## Loading in Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(phyloseq)
library(ANCOMBC)
library(microbiome)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
```

## Wrangling steps

```{r}
# load in phyloseq object
ps = readRDS('../processed_data/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')
```

```{r}
# setting seed
set.seed(412)
# Taxa is considered at the Genus level 
ps_genus = tax_glom(ps, 'Genus')

# filter out taxa with mean abundance of less than 0.0001 to reduce noise 
temp_relab = transform(ps_genus, 'compositional')
temp_filt = filter_taxa(temp_relab, function(x) mean(x) >= 0.0001, TRUE)

ps_filt = prune_taxa(taxa_names(temp_filt),ps_genus)
ps_filt
```

# HA Grouping Comparison

-   Run ANCOMBC2 analysis

-   Generate data layers necessary for heatmap generation

```{r}
# Running ANCOMBC2 Analysis
ha_out = ancombc2(data = ps_filt, 
               fix_formula = 'ha_group', 
               p_adj_method = 'BH',
               prv_cut = 0.3, # increased due to small sample size
               group = 'ha_group',
               pairwise = TRUE) # set to true as multiple pairwise comparison will be done 
res_prim = ha_out$res
res_pair = ha_out$res_pair

# Get genera names from genera ASVs 
genera_ha <- data.frame(ps_filt@tax_table) %>%
  rownames_to_column("taxon") %>%
  filter(taxon %in% res_pair$taxon) %>%
  select(taxon, Genus) %>%
  mutate(Genus = as.character(Genus),
         Genus = str_remove(Genus, "^\\s*g__"))

# Generate data layer that shows log2fold change 
ha_lfc = res_pair %>%
    filter(diff_robust_ha_group2 |
    diff_robust_ha_groupneg |
    diff_robust_ha_groupneg_ha_group2) %>%
    mutate(lfc1 = ifelse(diff_robust_ha_group2,
                  round(lfc_ha_group2, 2), 0),
         lfc2 = ifelse(diff_robust_ha_groupneg,
                  round(lfc_ha_groupneg, 2), 0),
         lfc3 = ifelse(diff_robust_ha_groupneg_ha_group2,
                  round(lfc_ha_groupneg_ha_group2, 2), 0)
  ) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = lfc1:lfc3, 
                        names_to = "group", values_to = "value") %>%
    arrange(taxon)

# Generate data layer that filters taxa that passes robust function
ha_robust_color = res_pair %>%
    filter(diff_robust_ha_group2 |
    diff_robust_ha_groupneg |
    diff_robust_ha_groupneg_ha_group2) %>%
    mutate(lfc1 = ifelse(diff_robust_ha_group2, 
                                "aquamarine3", "black"),
                  lfc2 = ifelse(diff_robust_ha_groupneg, 
                                "aquamarine3", "black"),
                  lfc3 = ifelse(diff_robust_ha_groupneg_ha_group2, 
                                "aquamarine3", "black")) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = lfc1:lfc3, 
                        names_to = "group", values_to = "color") %>%
    arrange(taxon)

# add Genus column into table 
ha_plot_df <- ha_lfc %>%
 left_join(ha_robust_color, by = c("taxon", "group")) %>%
left_join(genera_ha, by = "taxon")

# labelling grouping comparison names accordingly 
ha_plot_df$group = recode(ha_plot_df$group, 
                          `lfc1` = "HA Group 2/HA Group 1",
                          `lfc2` = "Negative/HA Group 1",
                          `lfc3` = "Negative/HA Group 2")
ha_plot_df$group = factor(ha_plot_df$group, 
                          levels = c("HA Group 2/HA Group 1",
                                     "Negative/HA Group 1", 
                                     "Negative/HA Group 2"))
```

# NA Grouping Comparison

-   Run ANCOMBC2 analysis

-   Generate data layers necessary for heatmap generation

```{r}
# Running ANCOMBC2 analysis on NA Group
na_out = ancombc2(data = ps_filt, 
               fix_formula = 'na_group', 
               p_adj_method = 'BH',
               prv_cut = 0.3,
               group = 'na_group',
               pairwise = TRUE) # increased due to small sample size
na_res_prim = na_out$res
na_res_pair = na_out$res_pair

# Get genera names from genera ASVs 
genera_na <- data.frame(ps_filt@tax_table) %>%
  rownames_to_column("taxon") %>%
  filter(taxon %in% na_res_pair$taxon) %>%
  select(taxon, Genus) %>%
  mutate(Genus = as.character(Genus),
         Genus = str_remove(Genus, "^\\s*g__"))

# Generate data layer that shows log2fold change 
# for interpretation purposes: if taxa doesn't pass robust function, returns as log2fold change
# 0; if passes, shows log2fold change. This ensures that non-differentially abundant taxa
# doesn't misleadingly show up as appearing "differentially abundant"

na_lfc = na_res_pair %>%
  filter(diff_robust_na_group2 |
    diff_robust_na_groupneg |
    diff_robust_na_groupneg_na_group2) %>%
  mutate(lfc1 = ifelse(diff_robust_na_group2,
                  round(lfc_na_group2, 2), 0),
         lfc2 = ifelse(diff_robust_na_groupneg,
                  round(lfc_na_groupneg, 2), 0),
         lfc3 = ifelse(diff_robust_na_groupneg_na_group2,
                  round(lfc_na_groupneg_na_group2, 2), 0)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = lfc1:lfc3,
               names_to = "group", values_to = "value") %>%
  arrange(taxon)


# Generate data layer that filters taxa that passes robust function, and color accordingly
na_robust_color = na_res_pair %>%
    filter(diff_robust_na_group2 |
    diff_robust_na_groupneg |
    diff_robust_na_groupneg_na_group2) %>%
    mutate(lfc1 = ifelse(diff_robust_na_group2, 
                                "aquamarine3", "black"),
                  lfc2 = ifelse(diff_robust_na_groupneg, 
                                "aquamarine3", "black"),
                  lfc3 = ifelse(diff_robust_na_groupneg_na_group2, 
                                "aquamarine3", "black")) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = lfc1:lfc3, 
                        names_to = "group", values_to = "color") %>%
    arrange(taxon)

# add Genus column into table 
na_plot_df <- na_lfc %>%
 left_join(na_robust_color, by = c("taxon", "group")) %>%
  left_join(genera_na, by = "taxon")

# labelling grouping comparison names accordingly 
na_plot_df$group = recode(na_plot_df$group, 
                          `lfc1` = "NA Group 2/NA Group 1",
                          `lfc2` = "Negative/NA Group 1",
                          `lfc3` = "Negative/NA Group 2")
na_plot_df$group = factor(na_plot_df$group, 
                          levels = c("NA Group 2/NA Group 1",
                                     "Negative/NA Group 1", 
                                     "Negative/NA Group 2"))
```

## Plotting heatmaps

```{r}
# manual scaling of colors: minimum refers to minimum log2fold across both HA and NA grouping
# comaprisons; maximum refers to maximum log2fold; mid refers to no significance ie. a log2fold
# change of 0 
hana_lo <- floor(min(c(ha_plot_df$value, na_plot_df$value)))
hana_up <- ceiling(max(c(ha_plot_df$value, na_plot_df$value)))
hana_mid <- 0

# Heatmap for HA Groupings 
ha_paired_heatmap = ha_plot_df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = group, y = Genus, fill = value)) + 
    geom_tile(color = "black") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "red", mid = "white", 
                         na.value = "white", midpoint = hana_mid, limits = c(hana_lo, hana_up)) + 
  # manual editing of labels for X-axis so that the labels can be split into two lines
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c(
    "HA Group 2/HA Group 1" = "HA Group 2 / \nHA Group 1",
    "Negative/HA Group 1" = "Negative / \nHA Group 1", 
    "Negative/HA Group 2" = "Negative / \nHA Group 2"
  )) + 
    geom_text(aes(label = value), size = 12, color = "black") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 35),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35),
          legend.text = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 28),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 30)) +
  # editing the legend so that it is longer/more proportional to the heatmap
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
        title = "Log2 Fold Change",
        title.hjust = 0.5,
        title.position = "top",
        barheight = unit(15, "cm"),
        barwidth = unit(2, "cm")))
ha_paired_heatmap

# Heatmap for NA Groupings 
na_paired_heatmap = na_plot_df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = group, y = Genus, fill = value)) + 
    geom_tile(color = "black") + 
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "red", mid = "white", 
                         na.value = "white", midpoint = hana_mid, limits = c(hana_lo, hana_up)) +
  # manual editing of labels for X-axis so that the labels can be split into two lines
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c(
    "NA Group 2/NA Group 1" = "NA Group 2 / \nNA Group 1",
    "Negative/NA Group 1" = "Negative / \nNA Group 1", 
    "Negative/NA Group 2" = "Negative / \nNA Group 2"
  )) + 
    geom_text(aes(label = value), size = 12, color = "black") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal() +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 35),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35),
          legend.text = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 28),
         legend.title = element_text(size = 30)) +
  # editing the legend so that it is longer/more proportional to the heatmap
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
        title = "Log2 Fold Change",
        title.hjust = 0.5,
        title.position = "top",
        barheight = unit(15, "cm"),
        barwidth = unit(2, "cm")))
na_paired_heatmap
```

# Saving Graphs Generated

```{r}
ggsave("../visualizations/figures/differential_abundance/differential_abundance_ha.png", plot = ha_paired_heatmap, width = 20, height = 15)

ggsave("../visualizations/figures/differential_abundance/differential_abundance_na.png", plot = na_paired_heatmap, width = 20, height = 15)
```
